message:
test: add 31 unit tests to analysis/causal.rs

causal.rs: 15→46 tests covering parse_timestamp_ms edge cases (timezone
offsets, fractional seconds, missing separators), days_from_date validation
(pre-1970, invalid month/day, epoch, leap year), blocker chain edge cases
(unknown target, multiple roots priority sorting), get_subnetwork (depth
clamping, unknown bead, density), build_impact_network_result (all vs
specific bead, empty ID), shared file edge threshold (requires >= 2 files),
network stats, cluster detection, and causality insights (blocked percentage
recommendations, duration_next_ms, completion state, edge count, gap desc).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
